nodes.context: Mexican criminal organization founded in 2009, active in Mexico City and surrounding states, involved in drug trafficking, kidnapping, extortion, and homicide.
Mexican criminal organization, rival of La Unión Tepito in Mexico City.
Splinter group from La Unión Tepito, formed in 2016 after a leadership dispute.
Powerful Mexican cartel, national enemy of La Unión Tepito.
Powerful Mexican cartel, national enemy of La Unión Tepito.

edges.evidence_quote: their main rivals within Mexico City are the Tláhuac Cartel (who have been enemies of La Union Tepito for more than a decade)
edges.context: La Unión Tepito and Tláhuac Cartel are enemies and rivals for more than a decade.

edges.evidence_quote: Fuerza Anti-Unión (a notorious splinter group from La Unión Tepito who broke away from them in 2016 after the founder of Fuerza Anti-Unión, Jorge Flores Concha (aka "El Tortas") had one of his brothers murdered at the behest of "El Betito" (the leader of La Unión Tepito at the time of the crime) and the other kidnapped).
edges.context: Fuerza Anti-Unión is a splinter group that broke away from La Unión Tepito in 2016 due to a murder and kidnapping ordered by La Unión Tepito's leader.

edges.evidence_quote: their biggest enemies are the Jalisco New Generation Cartel ( CJNG )
edges.context: Jalisco New Generation Cartel is a national enemy of La Unión Tepito.

edges.evidence_quote: their biggest enemies are the Jalisco New Generation Cartel ( CJNG ), the Sinaloa Cartel and La Familia Michoacana
edges.context: Sinaloa Cartel is a national enemy of La Unión Tepito.

edges.evidence_quote: their biggest enemies are the Jalisco New Generation Cartel ( CJNG ), the Sinaloa Cartel and La Familia Michoacana
edges.context: La Familia Michoacana is a national enemy of La Unión Tepito.

edges.context: Los Kilos is listed as an ally of La Unión Tepito in the infobox.
